channel.title: Posts on NeuZhou — AI Agent Security & Tools
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on NeuZhou — AI Agent Security & Tools

item.title: Provenance Laundering: A New Attack Vector Against AI Agent Memory Systems
item.description: AI agents now have persistent memory. We identified 8 attack vectors — including a novel one we call ‘provenance laundering’ — and built a prototype detector.

item.title: We Analyzed 31 GitHub Repos to Find What Makes a Great AI Skill
item.description: We ran repo2skill against 31 popular GitHub repos across 7 categories. Here’s what separates the best from the rest — and what you can do about it.
